source_pattern: Hormozi lead magnet formats via Daily Email Tactics
principle: A lead magnet must reveal a mistake, taste the result, or unbundle one piece of the paid offer.

magnets.title: The Paid-Traffic Leak Checklist
magnets.promise: Find the 7 mistakes making paid clicks die before they become leads.
magnets.buyer_state: Founder has traffic but does not know which page mistake is killing conversion.
magnets.cta: Run the free audit, then buy the $147 Fix Pack if you want the leaks implemented.

magnets.title: Free Leak Map Preview
magnets.promise: See the exact kind of output Nebula gives before buying implementation.
magnets.buyer_state: Lead wants proof that the audit/fix path is concrete, not generic advice.
magnets.cta: Generate your own free audit and see the first fix path.

magnets.title: CTA Rewrite Swipe Kit
magnets.promise: Get one unbundled piece of the Fix Pack: conversion-focused CTA rewrites.
magnets.buyer_state: Lead wants a useful implementation artifact, but not the whole service yet.
magnets.cta: Use the swipe, then buy the Fix Pack when they want the rest implemented.
